pending.body:
finding_summary: Resuming an in-progress iterative_minimal loop ignores the persisted implementer target and falls back to the current config target instead. engine.rs recovers stage_target from the interrupted snapshot at 1279-1289, but resume_run still preflights stage_plan[resume_state.stage_index].target at 2328-2350 and execute_iterative_plan_and_implement_stage invokes resolved_target.clone() at 7072-7163. If workflow.implementer_backend or model settings change after an iteration has completed, the resumed run can fail preflight or continue the same stage attempt on a different backend.
severity: medium
affected_files: ["src/contexts/workflow_composition/engine.rs:1279-1289", "src/contexts/workflow_composition/engine.rs:2328-2350", "src/contexts/workflow_composition/engine.rs:7072-7163"]
remediation_hint: When iterative_implementer_state.stage_target is present, resume preflight and subsequent iterative invocations should use that persisted target for the rest of the current stage attempt, not just terminal-output recovery.

finding_summary: The terminal-recovery path for iterative_minimal cannot reliably recover Codex process invocations when the parsed sidecar is missing. ProcessBackendAdapter reads the structured payload from the temporary last-message file and only stores stdout as raw output on success (process_backend.rs:341-398), but recover_structured_payload_from_process_stdout later treats every non-Claude raw transcript as plain JSON (process_backend.rs:1925-1933). Because iterative invocations persist the parsed sidecar on a best-effort basis only (engine.rs:6352-6377 and 7304-7311) and recover_iterative_payload_from_raw_output depends on that helper (engine.rs:6406-6425), a run that crashes after a terminal Codex iteration but before stage commit can become impossible to resume even though the iteration itself succeeded.
severity: medium
affected_files: ["src/adapters/process_backend.rs:341-398", "src/adapters/process_backend.rs:1925-1933", "src/contexts/workflow_composition/engine.rs:6352-6377", "src/contexts/workflow_composition/engine.rs:6406-6425", "src/contexts/workflow_composition/engine.rs:7304-7311"]
remediation_hint: Either make parsed sidecar persistence mandatory for Codex iterative invocations, or persist/recover the actual last-message payload format instead of assuming stdout alone is sufficient.

status_summary: running: final review restart round 16 -> Plan and Implement
